sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105393" key="trixa/raktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐχάρακτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">χαράσσω</etym>) <sense id="n105393.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divided in three places,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πίναξ τ. ζώναις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:1:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
